UpdateDedicatedChannelBfd.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](#idempotency).
UpdateDedicatedChannelBfd.etId: The ID of the dedicated line.
UpdateDedicatedChannelBfd.etChannelId: The ID of the dedicated line channel.
UpdateDedicatedChannelBfd.sendInterval: Packet send interval, an integer between 200 and 1000 (ms). Recommended value: 300.
UpdateDedicatedChannelBfd.receivInterval: Packet receive interval, an integer between 200 and 1000 (ms). Recommended value: 300.
UpdateDedicatedChannelBfd.detectMultiplier: Detection time multiplier, an integer between 3 and 10. Recommended value: 4.
